sourcesContent:
import React from 'react'; import { useNavigate } from 'react-router-dom'; import { FaCloud, FaAward, FaUsers, FaLaptopCode, FaRocket, FaBriefcase, FaChalkboardTeacher, FaArrowRight, FaCode, FaBrain, FaPalette, FaCalendarAlt, FaHandshake, FaUserTie, FaDollarSign, FaCamera, FaPencilRuler, FaPhoneAlt, } from 'react-icons/fa'; import './LandingPage.css'; const benefits = [ { icon: , label: 'AWS Certification\nGuidance' }, { icon: , label: 'Hands-on Cloud\nProjects' }, { icon: , label: 'Networking\nOpportunities' }, { icon: , label: 'Industry Expert\nSessions' }, { icon: , label: 'Hackathon\nParticipation' }, { icon: , label: 'Leadership\nExperience' }, { icon: , label: 'AWS Credits\nAccess' }, { icon: , label: 'Career\nDevelopment' }, ]; const domains = [ { key: 'tech', name: 'Tech', iconClass: 'tech', icon: , desc: 'Drive innovation through development projects, cloud workshops, and AI/ML research initiatives.', tags: ['Web / App Dev', 'AI & ML', 'Cloud & DevOps'], tagClass: '', }, { key: 'corp', name: 'Corp', iconClass: 'corp', icon: , desc: 'Lead event planning, public relations, HR, sponsorship drives, and strategic execution.', tags: ['Events', 'Personal Relations', 'HR & Admin', 'Sponsorship'], tagClass: 'corp-tag', }, { key: 'creatives', name: 'Creatives', iconClass: 'creatives', icon: , desc: 'Create compelling visual experiences through design, media, and UI/UX for ACC\'s brand.', tags: ['Digital Design', 'Media', 'UI/UX'], tagClass: 'creatives-tag', }, ]; export default function LandingPage() { const navigate = useNavigate(); return (
{/* Header */}

AWS CLOUD CLUB SRM

ACC'25 Team Recruitment

{/* Hero */}
Join the ACC Family

Shape the{' '} Future of Cloud

AWS Cloud Club at SRM Institute of Science and Technology empowers students to build cloud expertise, lead projects, and launch careers in the fastest-growing tech domain.

Application takes just 5 minutes

{/* Benefits */}

Why Join AWS Cloud Club SRM?

{benefits.map((b, i) => (
{b.icon}

{b.label}

))}
{/* Domains */}

Choose Your Domain

{domains.map((d) => (
{d.icon}

{d.name}

{d.desc}

{d.tags.map((t) => ( {t} ))}
))}
{/* CTA */}

Ready to Join?

Questions? Contact your recruitment coordinators

{/* Footer */}

AWS CLOUD CLUB SRM

© {new Date().getFullYear()} AWS Cloud Club at SRM Institute of Science and Technology. All rights reserved.

); }
